title: petelotiella tonkinensis
intro: Petelotiella tonkinensis is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the coffee or madder family. Traditionally, it is used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is valued for its health benefits, which include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Petelotiella tonkinensis can be made into infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
